text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've come to watch Tokai Teio's exhibition race.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm Tokai Teio! You are all blessed this day to be
up against the likes of me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Who is the best of the best and the pinnacle of
speed?! Why, it's me! Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You will all bear witness to the first chapter of my
legacy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Tokai Teio wins the race with
ease.

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio just completely dominated!

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Looks like she might just be the fastest
Umamusume after all!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Aren't I amazing?! That was a piece of
carrot cake! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: An easy victory, I see. That was splendid, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Prez! You came to watch me? I was pretty
awesome back there, wasn't I?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. You ran beautifully. I must offer you
some words of prai—

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
That was so cool, Tokai Teio! I can't wait to see
your winning concert!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, shoot...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Prez! I'd love to hear it, but... I've gotta
take care of something first!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Put on a show worthy of your
performance today, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: On it! You better keep your eyes on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio grabs the attention of the audience
with her quick dance moves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She truly looks invincible on that stage.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This is barely the beginning! My legacy will
continue forever and ever!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So keep rooting for your favorite runner, the
invincible Teio!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf gazes at the stage for a while,
deeply moved.
